topic: Elon Musk to Owe Billions After Jury Finds He Misled Twitter.

framework.structure: [Familiar Tool/Habit] + ['is secretly/actually'] + [Hidden Cost or Danger you didn't know about]
framework.trigger: Loss aversion + status threat — viewer is already being harmed without knowing it
framework.example: That iPhone feature everyone uses is secretly selling your location to 47 data brokers.

script.hook: That iPhone feature everyone uses is secretly selling your location to 47 data brokers.
script.body: Most people scroll past these tools every day without realising they exist. Once you know about them, you cannot un-know them.

full_script_text: That iPhone feature everyone uses is secretly selling your location to 47 data brokers. Most people scroll past these tools every day without realising they exist. Once you know about them, you cannot un-know them. What do you think?

visual_direction.kling_prompt: dark glowing computer screens with code, futuristic AI interface, neon blue and green, no faces, 9:16 vertical cinematic, cyberpunk, high contrast

caption_text: That iPhone feature everyone uses is secretly selling your location to 47 data b
